---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a scoped capability or compatibility improvement
title: "feat: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

Describe the operator or agent workflow that is currently unsupported.

## Proposed Behavior

Define the expected CLI, daemon, policy, or protocol behavior.

## Safety And Compatibility

Explain approval requirements, rollback behavior, credential handling, and
which MCP specification or client documentation supports the proposal.

## Acceptance Evidence

Describe the tests and real-client verification that would prove completion.
